description: CompositionPurple V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed neckline and hemFitRegular  Wash care Dry clean onlyCool iron if needed and iron print on reverseProne to pillThis piece adds polish to the classic V-neck sweater.
